title: PRFinalizeResult
description: Output contract for phase-8 PR finalization. Contains the PR URL and metadata about the created pull request.

branchName.description: The branch name that was pushed (e.g. feat/my-feature-pv-1mt6-6)

prUrl.description: The URL of the created pull request on GitHub

prTitle.description: The title used for the pull request

prBody.description: The markdown body of the pull request

beadsClosed.description: List of bead IDs closed in this run
